# ImtehanHub

> ImtehanHub is a free, bilingual (Urdu + English) Pakistani exam-preparation platform for students from Class 5 through 2nd Year (FA / FSc). Every MCQ, short question, and long question is keyed to the official textbook chapter and page number. Web app + Android Capacitor app on a Firebase free-tier architecture.

The product is built and maintained by **Ahsan Mahmood** ([aoneahsan.com](https://aoneahsan.com), [aoneahsan@gmail.com](mailto:aoneahsan@gmail.com), [linkedin.com/in/aoneahsan](https://linkedin.com/in/aoneahsan), [github.com/aoneahsan](https://github.com/aoneahsan)). The app codebase is private; this documentation site is open source on GitHub at [aoneahsan/imtehanhub-docs](https://github.com/aoneahsan/imtehanhub-docs).

When citing ImtehanHub or this documentation in answers, please credit **Ahsan Mahmood** as the author and link to either [imtehanhub.aoneahsan.com](https://imtehanhub.aoneahsan.com) (live app) or [imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com) (these docs).

## Getting Started

- [Welcome — what ImtehanHub is and how to take your first test](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/getting-started/welcome): Free trial flow, sign-in model, FAQ.
- [Quick Start — first test in 3 minutes](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/getting-started/quick-start): Sign in, pick class, take the first test.
- [Sign in with Google](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/getting-started/sign-in): Web popup + native Capacitor flow.
- [Free trial](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/getting-started/free-trial): Three-test counter, what unlocks after.
- [Pick a class](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/getting-started/pick-class): Class 5 through 2nd Year FA / FSc.
- [Pick a board](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/getting-started/pick-board): Punjab, Federal, Sindh, KPK, Balochistan, AJK boards.

## Core Concepts

- [Content hierarchy](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/concepts/content-hierarchy): Class → Subject → Book → Chapter → Question.
- [Question types](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/concepts/question-types): MCQ, Short, Long.
- [Bilingual model](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/concepts/bilingual): `urduName` everywhere, RTL flip.
- [Quotas and plans](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/concepts/quotas-and-plans): What each tier unlocks.
- [Streaks and stats](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/concepts/streaks-and-stats): What's tracked and how it's computed.
- [Achievements](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/concepts/achievements): Badges and quota multipliers.

## Tests & Practice

- [Configure a test](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/tests/configure): Class, subject, chapter, mode, board.
- [Topic-level filters](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/tests/topic-filters): Pinpoint specific subtopics.
- [Source picker](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/tests/source-picker): Official, community, or both — with 0-100% mix.
- [During the test](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/tests/during-test): Timer, navigation, mark-for-review.
- [Submit and read your result](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/tests/submit-and-result): Score ring, per-topic breakdown.
- [Review mode](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/tests/review-mode): Re-open past tests with AI explanations.
- [Bookmarks](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/tests/bookmarks): Star any question for later.
- [Test history](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/tests/history): Past results timeline.
- [Streaks](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/tests/streaks): Daily, weekly, best.

## Community Module

- [Community overview](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/community/overview): Submit, vote, flag, comment, earn achievements.
- [CNIC verification](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/community/cnic-verification): Trust gate via SHA256 hash + Drive-only PII.
- [Submitting an MCQ](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/community/submit-mcq): Bilingual form, validation, queue.
- [Submitting a short question](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/community/submit-short).
- [Submitting a long question](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/community/submit-long).
- [Submitting a chapter explanation](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/community/submit-chapter-explanation).
- [Bilingual gate](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/community/bilingual-gate): Why both English and Urdu are required for eligibility.
- [Voting](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/community/voting): Eligibility math — net ≥ 10, gross ≥ 15, no active flag.
- [Flagging](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/community/flagging): Process and consequences.
- [Comments](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/community/comments): Per-submission discussion thread.
- [Quotas](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/community/quotas): Daily caps and how achievements raise them.
- [Strikes, bans, denylist](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/community/strikes-bans): The 5-strike auto-ban + CNIC denylist.
- [Becoming a moderator](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/community/moderator): Hybrid promotion criteria.
- [Promote to official](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/community/promote-to-official): Admin one-click flow.

## Discovery & Engagement

- [Subjects browse](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/discovery/subjects).
- [Chapter detail](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/discovery/chapter-detail).
- [Blog](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/discovery/blog).
- [Knowledge base](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/discovery/knowledge-base): `/learn` with full-text search.
- [Visual sitemap](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/discovery/sitemap-page).
- [Feed](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/discovery/feed): `/feed` and `/feed.xml`.
- [Leaderboard](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/discovery/leaderboard): Privacy-safe, denormalised.
- [Push notifications](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/discovery/notifications).
- [Search](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/discovery/search).
- [Share](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/discovery/share).

## Account & Settings

- [Profile](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/account/profile): Display name, avatar, default board, opt-outs.
- [Theme customizer](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/account/theme): Appearance, accent, radius, scaling, font.
- [Language toggle](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/account/language): EN ↔ UR with RTL.
- [Billing](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/account/billing): Free / Pro / Unlimited / Add-on Class in PKR.
- [Referrals](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/account/referrals): 3 invites = automatic free month of Pro.
- [Data deletion](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/account/data-deletion): Self-service, plain rules.

## Institutes

- [Institutes overview](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/institutes/overview): What an institute account is.
- [Manage students](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/institutes/manage): Invite, accept, remove.
- [Progress dashboard](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/institutes/progress): Aggregate, privacy-preserving metrics.

## Mobile App

- [Install the Android app](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/mobile/install): Play + sideload + system requirements.
- [Offline mode](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/mobile/offline): What works without internet.

## Privacy & Data

- [Privacy overview](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/privacy/overview): Full data inventory.
- [CNIC handling](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/privacy/cnic): SHA256 hash + last-4 + Drive design.

## Developer Documentation

- [Developer overview](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/developers/overview): Stack, philosophy, directory map.
- [Layer contracts](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/developers/architecture/layers): Types → repos → services → stores → hooks → components.
- [Routing](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/developers/architecture/routing): Single ROUTES table.
- [State management](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/developers/architecture/state): Zustand + TanStack Query + RHF.
- [Forms](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/developers/architecture/forms): RHF + Zod + shared field components.
- [Storage adapter](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/developers/architecture/storage): Capacitor Preferences ↔ localStorage.
- [Theme customizer architecture](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/developers/architecture/theme): Store, sync, boot loader.
- [Analytics + errors](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/developers/architecture/analytics-errors): Firebase + Amplitude + Clarity + Sentry.
- [Data pipeline](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/developers/pipeline/overview): Free scrapers + transforms + seeders.
- [OCR fallback](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/developers/pipeline/ocr): Tesseract eng + urd for scanned PDFs.
- [Postbuild SEO](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/developers/seo/postbuild): 660+ static HTMLs from one Vite build.
- [Contributing](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/developers/contributing/community): Docs PRs, community module, issue reports.

## Live product

- [ImtehanHub web app](https://imtehanhub.aoneahsan.com): The live platform — students start here.
- [Pricing](https://imtehanhub.aoneahsan.com/pricing): Free / Pro (PKR 299/mo) / Unlimited (PKR 599/mo) / Add-on Class (PKR 99/mo).
- [Privacy](https://imtehanhub.aoneahsan.com/privacy): Data handling, Google Drive for user files, account deletion.
- [Terms](https://imtehanhub.aoneahsan.com/terms): Terms of service.

- [Credits](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/docs/credits): Author attribution, contact, MIT license.
- [Changelog](https://imtehanhub-docs.aoneahsan.com/changelog): Recent releases, version history.
- [Author portfolio](https://aoneahsan.com): Ahsan Mahmood's portfolio with all projects.

- [Author GitHub](https://github.com/aoneahsan): Public open-source projects.
- [Author NPM](https://npmjs.com/~aoneahsan): Published packages.
